{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231542222A36C2E69BCCEC070125"}"},"total":439},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7616181929692939032","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书评很多职业差评人，请广大书友擦亮眼睛"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773284749,"group_id":"7546064238784039961","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1438581454286189"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546064238784039961","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1448"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":241,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7605581605396726552","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对自己的作品评价一下吧，这是一本绝对无敌大无敌文，绝对没有什么修炼，也没有什么天下无敌天上来敌，天道都是主角操控，主角就是诸天万界最牛的存在，没有之一。
因为是无敌文，所以并没有女主，但是会有很多有趣的女人物，但是主角绝对不是见到女人走不动道的舔狗，主角就是纯粹的西格玛男人。
总之本书就是类似于康熙微服私访记的无敌文仙侠小说，无论如何恶劣的环境，如何强大的敌人，如何阴森恐怖的气氛，对读者来说都是有安全感的，因为主角就是无敌的，心情好就是一招秒，心情不好一个意念就秒了。
还有就是，主角并不是无脑杀人的龙王，喜欢无脑装逼的请谨慎阅读","text_exts":[{"e":65,"s":61,"text":"诸天万界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251742EC070125%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605581605396726552%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546064238784039961%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770815582,"group_id":"7546064238784039961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"拥有多年网文创作经验，擅长都市文和仙侠文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3J/seoFMU/flpoHx3hABI7JoCrb9EjFi/hX3KEv+Qfg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1726fcba58df4639b62b53da0f7d4579~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790577&x-signature=HdkOBfN8EyYIcuXdi%2BSNoK9LGt4%3D","user_id":"1438581454286189","user_name":"封清扬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1438581454286189","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_4","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.4","title_id":"author_level_4"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.4","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.4"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546064238784039961","book_info":{"abstract":"【超级大佬+绝对无敌+无系统+长生流+扮猪吃虎+世界观宏大+日常休闲+杀伐果断】
林北玄穿越修仙界，经过亿万万载的刻苦修炼，终于证道成帝，成为宇宙无敌的北玄大帝。
无尽的岁月，长生久视，天庭仙官粉饰太平，将诸天万界描绘成太平盛世。但林北玄知道事实并非如此。
经过思考后，林北玄决定亲自到下界走一走，来一个微服私访。
不走不知道，一走吓一跳，林北玄没想到的是。
当年随手扔的剑，竟成为掀起位面之战的导火索。
当年醉酒说的酒话，竟成为一方仙界的顶级心法。
当年随手收的奴婢，竟成为名震天下的绝美仙子。

无上修为尽在身，看似凡人，实则言出法随、一眼可决万物生死。
游戏风尘，随性而行，遇有趣人，亦会驻足旁观。

从仙国神朝斗争到仙门大宗浩劫，于林北玄而言，皆是一场戏剧。他低调入世，扮猪吃虎，视诸天强者如蝼蚁，偶尔展露的冰山一角，便足以令万界震颤。

这是一场属于绝对无敌者的悠闲之旅。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8991d20405679a535c2bfed49fb08125","author":"封清扬","author_id":"","book_id":"7546064238784039961","book_name":"仙界无敌后，我在下界微服私访","book_short_name":"大帝微服私访记","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#587890","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556117596383232537","read_count":"63006","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1014956"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"355","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,奇幻仙侠,无敌,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3d6b9d82fa78e202bef41392e9301503~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435742&x-signature=R%2BatBHwViE9iTIHiaTQwfByzV9g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1438581454286189","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"696"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231542222A36C2E69BCCEC070125"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"li
